description: Magic: The Gathering card search, combo lookup, draft analytics, and Commander tools.
name: io.github.j4th/mtg-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Logging level — DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, or ERROR
environmentVariables.name: MTG_MCP_LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: Enable EDHREC commander metagame backend (uses undocumented endpoints)
environmentVariables.name: MTG_MCP_ENABLE_EDHREC

environmentVariables.description: Enable Scryfall Oracle Cards bulk data for rate-limit-free lookups (~30 MB download)
environmentVariables.name: MTG_MCP_ENABLE_BULK_DATA

environmentVariables.description: Minimum delay between Scryfall API calls in milliseconds
environmentVariables.name: MTG_MCP_SCRYFALL_RATE_LIMIT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Hours between Scryfall bulk data refreshes
environmentVariables.name: MTG_MCP_BULK_DATA_REFRESH_HOURS

environmentVariables.description: Enable Comprehensive Rules engine for rules lookup and keyword tools
environmentVariables.name: MTG_MCP_ENABLE_RULES

environmentVariables.description: Disable in-memory TTL caching (useful for testing)
environmentVariables.name: MTG_MCP_DISABLE_CACHE

title: MTG MCP Server
